scene: A phone with a glowing blue GPS dot on a map, big black caps YOUR GPS. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
The blue dot drifting far off the road with a red error arrow, big black caps WRONG BY 2 KM A DAY. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

A dotted line from the phone tracing back in time to doodle-Einstein daydreaming at the patent desk, big black caps WRITTEN FOR FUN. (Doodle-Einstein is a crude stick figure with a round white head, wild messy white hair sticking out, a bushy white mustache, dot eyes, thin line body.) Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

Doodle-Einstein curiously watching a beam of light between paperwork stamps, big black caps A BORED CLERK. (Doodle-Einstein is a crude stick figure with a round white head, wild messy white hair sticking out, a bushy white mustache, dot eyes, thin line body.) Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
A big glowing red question mark over a row of empty portrait frames, big black caps WHERE ARE THEY NOW? Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
